Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to be performed after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total waiting time to the Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that eventually lead to rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in successful variants involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to be followed by any approval activity (e.g., Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER, Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION, or Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Request Payment in variants that complete without rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in variants that do not contain any rejection activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that later experience Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus cases that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to the time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that eventually result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to be done before the first submission attempt in multi-submission variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE relative to the start of the case in variants that include rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that are ultimately approved versus those that are rejected by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that bypass PRE_APPROVER versus those that include PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants with repeated rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and the next occurrence of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases with multiple save events
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE'
